art.summary: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, per 2026 Art Basel/UBS report. US leads with 44% share. In-person sales are recovering while online sales decline.
art.notable: Cautious optimism for 2026; 43% of dealers expect sales improvement. Middle East identified as a key growth region.

market.summary: Markets closed for the weekend. No changes since the 12:00 update.

stats.Outlook: Volatility expected for Monday; market focus remains on Middle East developments and inflation indices.
